Tricky ID. Seen distantly with a scope. Prominent white wing patch. White mark under eye. Yellowish-orange bill. First impression was wing patch too broad and large for velvet scoter. Thought it was a White-winged Scoter Closer examination of photos suggests Velvet is proper ID. Poor photos. Open and eager for correction
